tasks.title: Detect an anomaly in telemetry
tasks.prompt: From telemetry-sim streams, identify the anomalous KPI and the affected scope.

tasks.title: Distinguish signal from noise
tasks.prompt: Decide whether the deviation warrants action or is within expected variance.

tasks.title: Forecast demand and root cause
tasks.prompt: Project capacity demand and attribute the anomaly to a probable root cause.

tasks.title: DOIL intent for remediation
tasks.prompt: Express the recommended intervention as a constrained DOIL intent.
